name: Summer Beach Characters — Cozy Pixel Art Sprites
description:
Meet the locals! From the cheerful sunny_sun to the graceful sea_turtle, this character pack brings your beach scene to life.

A set of 7 hand-crafted PICO-8 palette pixel art characters in a cozy summer beach style. Each sprite uses the authentic PICO-8 inspired retro palette with clean 1px outlines on transparent backgrounds.

✨ **Includes:**
• 7 unique sprites (32×32)
• Full sprite sheet strip
• CC0 license — use in any project, personal or commercial

**Perfect for:** Cozy games, beach/RPG/simulation games, summer-themed projects, management sims, and pixel art adventures.
**Quality Score:** 8.1/10 — Curator Approved with Distinction
